sentences.target: On voit une étoile ce soir.

translations.fr: On voit une étoile ce soir.
translations.en: We can see a star tonight.
translations.es: Podemos ver una estrella esta noche.
translations.de: Wir können heute Abend einen Stern sehen.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 별 하나를 볼 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们能看到一颗星星。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы можем увидеть звезду.
translations.pt: Podemos ver uma estrela esta noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta có thể thấy một ngôi sao.
translations.nl: We kunnen vanavond een ster zien.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми можемо побачити зірку.
translations.hi: आज रात हम एक तारा देख सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να δούμε ένα αστέρι απόψε.
translations.nb: Vi kan se en stjerne i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kita bisa melihat sebuah bintang.
translations.sv: Vi kan se en stjärna ikväll.
translations.ro: Putem vedea o stea în seara asta.
translations.da: Vi kan se en stjerne i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜は星がひとつ見えます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (often used for 'we'); 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of 'voir'; takes direct object 'une étoile'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'étoile'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'voit'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form the temporal NP 'ce soir' (tonight).
Common noun, masculine; used as a temporal complement.

sentences.target: Tu as une étoile sur ta veste.

translations.fr: Tu as une étoile sur ta veste.
translations.en: You have a star on your jacket.
translations.es: Tienes una estrella en tu chaqueta.
translations.de: Du hast einen Stern auf deiner Jacke.
translations.it: Hai una stella sulla tua giacca.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的夹克上有一颗星星。
translations.pt: Você tem uma estrela na sua jaqueta.
translations.he: יש לך כוכב על הג'קט שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn có một ngôi sao trên áo khoác.
translations.nl: Je hebt een ster op je jas.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी जैकेट पर एक सितारा है.
translations.el: Έχεις ένα αστέρι στο μπουφάν σου.
translations.nb: Du har en stjerne på jakken din.
translations.id: Kamu punya sebuah bintang di jaketmu.
translations.sv: Du har en stjärna på din jacka.
translations.ro: Ai o stea pe geaca ta.
translations.da: Du har en stjerne på din jakke.
translations.ja: あなたのジャケットに星がひとつあります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular of 'avoir'; takes direct object 'une étoile'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'étoile'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'as'.
Preposition indicating location; introduces the PP 'sur ta veste'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; feminine singular agreeing with 'veste'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Je mets une étoile à ce resto.

translations.fr: Je mets une étoile à ce resto.
translations.en: I'm giving one star to this restaurant.
translations.es: Le pongo una estrella a este restaurante.
translations.de: Ich gebe diesem Restaurant einen Stern.
translations.it: Do a questo ristorante una stella.
translations.zh-Hans: 我给这家餐厅打一颗星。
translations.ru: Я ставлю этому ресторану одну звезду.
translations.pt: Dou uma estrela a este restaurante.
translations.he: אני נותן למסעדה הזאת כוכב אחד.
translations.vi: Tôi cho nhà hàng này một sao.
translations.ar: أنا أعطي هذا المطعم نجمة واحدة.
translations.nl: Ik geef dit restaurant één ster.
translations.uk: Я ставлю цьому ресторану одну зірку.
translations.hu: Ennek az étteremnek egy csillagot adok.
translations.hi: मैं इस रेस्टोरेंट को एक स्टार दे रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω σε αυτό το εστιατόριο ένα αστέρι.
translations.nb: Jeg gir denne restauranten én stjerne.
translations.id: Saya memberi restoran ini satu bintang.
translations.sv: Jag ger den här restaurangen en stjärna.
translations.da: Jeg giver denne restaurant én stjerne.
translations.ja: このレストランに星をひとつ付けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular of 'mettre'; 'une étoile' is the direct object (rating).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'étoile'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'mets'.
Preposition marking recipient/target; introduces the PP 'à ce resto'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'resto'.
Common noun, masculine; colloquial for 'restaurant'; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Elle porte un collier avec une étoile.

translations.fr: Elle porte un collier avec une étoile.
translations.en: She is wearing a necklace with a star.
translations.es: Ella lleva un collar con una estrella.
translations.de: Sie trägt eine Halskette mit einem Stern.
translations.it: Lei indossa una collana con una stella.
translations.ko: 그녀는 별이 달린 목걸이를 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她戴着一条带星星的项链。
translations.yue: 佢戴住一條有星星嘅項鏈。
translations.pt: Ela está usando um colar com uma estrela.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đeo một dây chuyền có hình ngôi sao.
translations.nl: Ze draagt een ketting met een ster.
translations.hi: वह एक सितारे वाला हार पहन रही है.
translations.nb: Hun har på seg et halskjede med en stjerne.
translations.sv: Hon bär ett halsband med en stjärna.
translations.ro: Ea poartă un colier cu o stea.
translations.da: Hun har en halskæde med en stjerne.
translations.fi: Hänellä on kaulakoru, jossa on tähti.
translations.ja: 彼女は星がついたネックレスを身につけています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of 'porter'; takes direct object 'un collier'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'collier'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'porte'.
Preposition introducing an accompaniment/detail; heads the PP 'avec une étoile'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'étoile'.
Common noun, feminine; complement of the preposition 'avec' within the PP.
